item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness as BSE 100 Drops 1.31% Amid Defensive-Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.31% on the day and registering a sharper 2.06% fall over the past five trading days. This downturn reflects a broader market hesitation as investors weigh defensive resilience against cyclical vulnerabilities amid evolving macroeconomic conditions. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable downturn in recent sessions, reflecting broader market pressures on the small-cap segment. Despite pockets of strong individual stock performances, the overall trend points to underperformance relative to larger benchmarks, with sectoral disparities and weak breadth indicators underscoring the challenges faced by this market segment. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The mid-cap segment experienced a notable decline on 3 March 2026, with the BSE Midcap index falling by 1.04% on the day and registering a 0.2% drop over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall weakness, select stocks within the segment demonstrated resilience, highlighting a mixed performance landscape driven by sectoral disparities and market breadth challenges. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as Defensive Stocks Outperform
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness over recent sessions, declining by 1.31% on the day and 2.06% over the past five days. Despite the broad downturn, select heavyweight stocks and defensive sectors have shown resilience, highlighting a cautious investor stance amid prevailing market uncertainties. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Broad Decline Amid Weak Market Sentiment
item.description: The mid-cap segment, as measured by the BSE Midcap index, experienced a notable downturn, declining by 1.04% on 3 March 2026. This marks a continuation of recent weakness, with the index also down 0.2% over the past five trading sessions, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment amid mixed sectoral performances and broad market pressures. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness on 3 Mar 2026
item.description: The small-cap segment, as measured by the BSE Smallcap index, has experienced notable weakness in recent sessions, declining by 0.89% on the day and 1.32% over the past five trading days. Despite this overall downturn, select stocks within the segment have delivered strong returns, highlighting a mixed performance landscape amid broader market challenges. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: Excelsoft Technologies Downgraded to Sell Amid Valuation and Technical Concerns
item.description: Excelsoft Technologies Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026. The downgrade reflects a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, stretched valuation metrics, stagnant financial trends, and a reassessment of the company’s overall quality. This comprehensive analysis explores the four key parameters that triggered the rating change and what it means for investors. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical Weakness and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Billionbrains Garage Ventures Ltd has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026, reflecting a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, expensive valuation metrics, and waning institutional interest. Despite strong long-term fundamentals, the stock’s recent performance and market signals have prompted a reassessment of its outlook within the capital markets sector. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Lenskart Solutions Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Lenskart Solutions Ltd, a dominant player in the diversified consumer products sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026. This shift reflects a comprehensive reassessment across quality, valuation, financial trends, and technical indicators, signalling caution for investors despite the company’s strong market presence and recent profit growth. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Canara Robeco Asset Management Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical Weakness and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Canara Robeco Asset Management Company Ltd has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026, driven primarily by deteriorating technical indicators and stretched valuation metrics. Despite strong long-term fundamentals, the stock’s recent price performance and market trends have raised caution among analysts, prompting a reassessment of its outlook. Time: 54 minutes ago

item.title: Infinity Infoway Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Infinity Infoway Ltd, a player in the Software Products sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026. This shift reflects a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, expensive valuation metrics, and a lacklustre financial trend despite some operational strengths. The company’s current Mojo Score stands at 48.0, with a Mojo Grade of Sell, signalling caution for investors amid sideways technical trends and valuation pressures. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Glottis Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Weak Financials and Bearish Technicals
item.description: Glottis Ltd, a player in the transport services sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell following a comprehensive reassessment of its quality, valuation, financial trends, and technical indicators. The downgrade reflects deteriorating fundamentals, weak quarterly results, and a shift towards bearish technical signals, signalling caution for investors amid challenging market conditions. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Jinkushal Industries Downgraded to Sell Amid Weak Financials and Bearish Technicals
item.description: Jinkushal Industries Ltd, a player in the automobile sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026. This decision follows a comprehensive reassessment across four critical parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technical indicators. The downgrade reflects deteriorating fundamentals, weak price momentum, and disappointing quarterly results, signalling caution for investors amid a challenging market environment. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd Downgraded to Hold Amid Technical and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Jain Resource Recycling Ltd, a key player in the non-ferrous metals sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Buy to Hold as of 2 March 2026. This adjustment reflects a nuanced reassessment across four critical parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technical indicators. Despite robust quarterly earnings and strong management efficiency, evolving market dynamics and technical signals have prompted a more cautious stance. Time: 55 minutes ago

item.title: BMW Ventures Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical Weakness and Stagnant Growth
item.description: BMW Ventures Ltd, a key player in the industrial products sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell as of 2 March 2026. This shift reflects a combination of deteriorating technical indicators, stagnant financial trends, and valuation concerns, signalling caution for investors amid a challenging market environment. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Ganesh Consumer Products Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical Weakness and Flat Financials
item.description: Ganesh Consumer Products Ltd, a player in the Other Agricultural Products sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell by MarketsMOJO as of 2 March 2026. This decision follows a comprehensive reassessment across four key parameters: Quality, Valuation, Financial Trend, and Technicals, reflecting a cautious outlook despite some positive fundamentals. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Atlanta Electricals Ltd Downgraded to Hold Amid Technical and Valuation Concerns
item.description: Atlanta Electricals Ltd, a key player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Buy to Hold as of 2 March 2026. This revision reflects a nuanced reassessment across four critical parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technicals. While the company continues to demonstrate solid fundamentals and positive quarterly results, emerging technical signals and valuation metrics have tempered investor enthusiasm, prompting a more cautious stance. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: GK Energy Ltd Downgraded to Hold Amid Technical Weakness and Market Underperformance
item.description: GK Energy Ltd, a key player in the Compressors, Pumps & Diesel Engines sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Strong Buy to Hold as of 2 March 2026. This adjustment reflects a nuanced assessment across four critical parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technicals, with technical indicators notably driving the change despite robust quarterly financial performance. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd Downgraded to Hold Amid Mixed Technical and Valuation Signals
item.description: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd has seen its investment rating downgraded from Strong Buy to Hold as of 2 March 2026, reflecting a nuanced reassessment across key parameters including technical trends, valuation metrics, financial performance, and overall quality. This recalibration comes amid a mildly bearish technical outlook and an attractive valuation profile, signalling a more cautious stance despite robust fundamentals. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Dev Accelerator Ltd Downgraded to Sell Amid Technical and Financial Concerns
item.description: Dev Accelerator Ltd, a player in the diversified commercial services sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Hold to Sell by MarketsMOJO as of 2 March 2026. This decision follows a comprehensive reassessment across four key parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technicals, reflecting a deteriorating outlook despite some long-term growth indicators. Time: 56 minutes ago
